Acme's recent work continues to leverage cutting-edge AI to deliver world-class developer experiences across the platform.

**Acme further improved the cloud platform.** The team has been pushing forward with seamless integrations and powerful new capabilities for next-generation workloads. Acme Cloud users can now utilize advanced storage features.

**Acme announced a transformative new SDK.** Representing a comprehensive rethinking of the developer experience, the SDK is a leap forward for teams building modern applications.

**The Acme team doubled down on observability.** Acme's observability suite now provides best-in-class performance for high-cardinality workloads, giving customers a clear edge over alternatives.
